hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams detect and close operational gaps by consolidating AML evidence, case workflows, and audit trails into a unified compliance operating layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across scattered evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and uncertainty when AML case data, alerts, and provider outputs remain siloed across multiple tools. This fragmentation makes it difficult to assemble a consistent audit trail and identify gaps before regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies alerts, provider results, case reviews and decision logs into a structured compliance workflow that preserves audit-ready evidence and closes gaps before regulatory inspections.
workflow_description: SFTY routes alerts through risk rules, review workflows and case creation to preserve evidence and prepare audit-ready packages for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects isolated provider outputs into structured reviews, decisions, cases and evidence to help VASP compliance teams identify and close AML audit and inspection gaps efficiently.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASP compliance teams a controlled layer for preserving audit evidence, orchestrating provider outputs, supporting bank due diligence and managing enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to identify AML audit evidence gaps
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows support audit-ready AML evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs connect to compliance evidence packages
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports audit gap analysis for VASPs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, case management and reporting workflows for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support audit gap analysis?
faq_2_answer: SFTY identifies compliance gaps by mapping fragmented checks into structured workflows, highlighting missing evidence, outdated rules and manual processes before audits or regulatory inspections.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and evidence packages to support audit-ready documentation for review and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into one operational layer without disrupting current compliance tools or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by structuring their results into workflows, decisions, cases and reports rather than replacing them.
final_title: Review audit readiness for AML compliance gaps
final_description: Explore how SFTY structures AML case workflows, evidence packages and audit trails for clearer compliance review and gap analysis.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
